details: The Lakshadweep Scholarship Scheme an initiative by the Department of Education under the Ministry of Human Resource Development, aims to provide financial assistance to students from the Lakshadweep union territory. This program will alleviate financial burdens and empower students to pursue their educational aspirations.
benefits: Name of the Courses
Scholarship Amount
Pre-degree courses, Post Matric certificate courses, Post Matric Diploma courses, Degree Courses in Arts, Science, commerce, B.Ed., LLB etc.
Rate of monthly scholarship ₹ 1,800/-, Rate of lump sum grant ₹ 1,500/-
Post Graduate course in Arts, Science, Commerce, Law etc.
Rate of monthly scholarship ₹ 2,100/-, Rate of lump sum grant ₹ 1,800/-
MBBS, BDS, Engineering Degree, MBA, BVSC, BSC(Agriculture) etc.
Rate of monthly scholarship ₹ 2,100/-, Rate of lump sum grant ₹ 3,600/-
Post Graduate Course in Medicine, Engineering and Veterinary Science, Agriculture etc. and Research Studies like Ph.D.
Rate of monthly scholarship ₹ 3,000/- , Rate of lump sum grant ₹ 9,000/-
High school courses or equivalent.
₹ 1,200/- per month
Primary school courses (1 to VIII)
₹ 600/- per month
Secondary school courses (VIII to X)
₹ 200/- per month
Plus two students to whom course facilities are available in the island of which the student is native
₹ 450/- per month
Students of Bitra Island studying in Secondary Std. in other Island
Students of Plus 2 courses who belong to other islands than where the Institutions is situated and staying outside hostel for want of hostel accommodation
₹ 750/- per month
Students of high school staying outside hostel for want of accommodation in the hostel
eligibility: Both parents and the student must be born in Lakshadweep or have one parent from Lakshadweep.
The student and the Islander parent must reside in the Islands.
Scholars cannot receive other scholarships, must surrender any awards, and repay funds received.
Retention of concessions granted by the institution or administration is allowed.
Scholars can pursue courses in Arts, Science, Engineering, Medicine, Agriculture, Law, or Commerce in recognized Indian institutions.
Educational concessions on the mainland are only for studies not available in the Islands.
Stipends may be granted or renewed for health reasons or disability.

online: The applications are invited on the National Scholarship Portal (NSP) (
) in the month of April every year.
Read the Instruction /Guidelines, provide the under taking by click on Check box and click on Continue.
Start the registration by Mobile OTP and get the Registration ID.
For future reference, a system-generated registration number is sent to the students.

faqs.question: What is this scheme ?
faqs.answer: The Lakshadweep Scholarship Scheme is a government initiative aimed at providing financial assistance to students from Lakshadweep pursuing higher education.

faqs.question: What is the objective of the scheme?
faqs.answer: The main objective of the scheme is to alleviate financial burdens and empower students to pursue their educational aspirations.

faqs.question: Can students from other states/UTs also apply for this scheme?
faqs.answer: Both parents and the student must be born in Lakshadweep or have one parent from Lakshadweep.

faqs.question: Can student get the benefits of multiple scheme parallelly ?
faqs.answer: Scholars cannot receive other scholarships, must surrender any awards, and repay funds received.

faqs.question: What documents are required ?
faqs.answer: 1. Domicile Certificate. 2. Income Certificate. 3. Educational Certificate. 4. Caste Certificate. 5. Aadhaar Card. 6. Bank Passbook. 7. Passport Size Photograph.

faqs.question: What is the procedure to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: Applicant must be registered on Nation Scholarship Portal (NSP) and only than applicant can apply for the scheme.

faqs.question: How to apply for the scheme?
faqs.answer: 1. Open the official NSP website and click on New Registration under Applicant Corner. 2. Read the Instruction /Guidelines, provide the under taking by click on Check box and click on Continue. 3. Start the registration by Mobile OTP and get the Registration ID. 4. Submit required document.
